# americancloud_isolated_network (Resource)

An isolated (single-tier) private network. `name` and `description` are updatable in place.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "americancloud_isolated_network" "example" {
  name        = "app-net"
  description = "Application tier network"
  region      = "us-west-0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Network name.
- `region` (String) Region label, e.g. `us-west-0`. Changing this forces a new network.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway IP. Omit for the default. Forces a new network.
- `netmask` (String) Netmask, e.g. `255.255.255.0`. Omit for the default. Forces a new network.

### Read-Only

- `cidr` (String) Network CIDR.
- `created_at` (String) Creation time (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Network identifier (UUID).
- `status` (String) Network status.
